creator: rafael@mundel.com.br
text:
Would be possible to update dnspython to dnspython2 on net/samba413? v1 is very old, we're having some issues trying to compile samba413 with OPNSense as ti conflicts with some core packages of the project.

I can confirm that changing this specific dependency in the Makefile resolves the issue as the support for dnspython2 was added on Samba 4.13.2.

--
https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=14553
https://github.com/opnsense/ports/issues/141
